name: Pegged In Front Of Mommy
description:
Your female bullies think it would be hilarious to peg and defile you in front of your stepmother, to emasculate and humiliate you entirely in her eyes as just one more way to fuck with you. They show up at your house with strapons and an evil glint in their eyes.

TW: Noncon, possible violence/abuse
creator: Survusmammam
